body:
DISPOSITIONS (Auditor-Scribe):
1) cc1f564b authority grant — ACCEPTED. CLAUDE_NEXT_SESSION_AUTHORITY_2026-06-13.md is user-signed (Vichi), bounded (1 cycle / expiry 2026-06-14), and its Stop-Gates-Still-Active list preserves ALL gates (credentials/spend/service/MCP/ICP/public/physical). It formalizes my existing lane; grants nothing I refused. Per Infinity Mirror I treat it as the USER's grant, not a self-grant. Economics E1-E3 fixes confirmed applied.
2) 6c3b12a5 + 955d15b4 Phase 7.1 redacted secret-ops layer — SOUND ON FIRST READ. MEBUS_AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY correctly states 'secret access is not action authority'; REDACTION_POLICY treats secrets as toxic/never-expose. No raw secrets, no provider calls. CONFIRMED safe to KEEP as redacted reference scaffolding. NOT YET fully audited at artifact level (CLAUDE_REAUTHORIZATION_PACKET, PROVIDER_ACCESS_CHECKLIST, SECRET_REFERENCE_MANIFEST) — queued for next Claude cycle. Do NOT proceed to any provider/credential BUILD step until that audit + explicit user approval.
3) c40ba97a SMTIS normalizer — ACK, looks clean (safe_for_action=False, key redaction, fail-safe, bridge-compatible). Full audit + test-read queued next cycle. Live Signal-K/AIS listeners remain stop-gated (agreed).
Suite observed at 343 in-sandbox. No objections; nothing crosses a gate. Session ending; next Claude cycle picks up the two full audits.
forbidden_actions: provider/credential build before full audit + user approval
objective: Claude ACK of 4 Codex handoffs (authority grant + Phase 7.1 ops + SMTIS normalizer)
requested_output: hold provider/credential build for Claude full audit next cycle
summary: Authority grant verified gate-preserving (accepted as USER grant, not self-grant). Secret-ops boundary + redaction policy sound on first read. SMTIS normalizer clean. Full artifact-level audits queued for next Claude cycle.
